# VisaClear

> VisaClear (by Vericore) gives visa applicants a precise, personalised document checklist in about 60 seconds — built specifically for applicants from Africa, Asia, and Latin America, who are disproportionately affected by avoidable visa refusals.

VisaClear turns a visa applicant's origin, destination, and visa type into a concrete list of exactly which documents are required, plus tools to track readiness, catch mistakes before submission, and connect with verified immigration agents for complex cases. It is not a law firm, a government service, or a guarantee of approval — it is a document-readiness and preparation tool.

## Core product

- [Home](https://visaclear.app/): what VisaClear does and who it's for
- [Checklist tool](https://visaclear.app/checklist): generate a personalised visa document checklist
- [Rejection Analyser](https://visaclear.app/rejection-analyser): AI review of a past refusal letter to identify what likely went wrong
- [Risk Score](https://visaclear.app/risk-score): an approval-likelihood estimate based on application details
- [Wait Times](https://visaclear.app/wait-times): crowd-sourced visa processing time data by corridor
- [Visa comparison](https://visaclear.app/visa/compare): compare requirements across destinations

## Agents & community

- [Find a verified immigration agent](https://visaclear.app/agents): marketplace of vetted agents for complex cases
- [Wall of Fame](https://visaclear.app/wall-of-fame): real applicant approval stories
- [Community](https://visaclear.app/community): applicant discussion and shared experience
- [Blog](https://visaclear.app/blog): visa guidance and corridor-specific articles

## Company

- [About](https://visaclear.app/about): who built VisaClear and why
- [Pricing](https://visaclear.app/pricing): free and paid plan details
- [Security](https://visaclear.app/security): security practices and vulnerability disclosure policy
- [Privacy Policy](https://visaclear.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://visaclear.app/terms)

## Optional

- [For Employers & Universities](https://visaclear.app/business): organisation cohort-tracking tools
- [Contact](https://visaclear.app/contact)
